description: Configure Screaming Frog SEO Spider to extract HTTP response headers from https://crawler-test.com/ using Custom Extraction. Extract the 'Server' header as 'Server_Header', the 'Content-Type' header as 'Mime_Type', and the 'Date' header as 'Response_Date'. After crawling at least 20 URLs, export the results to ~/Documents/SEO/exports/header_audit.csv. Write a report to ~/Documents/SEO/reports/server_fingerprint.txt identifying the web server software and the count of unique content types found.
